title: ononis ramosissima var. arganietorum
intro: Ononis ramosissima var. arganietorum, also known as the Spiny Restharrow or Spiny Burnet, is a perennial plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Ononis ramosissima var. arganietorum include its ability to treat digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, or used in herbal preparations such as salves and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
